title: NoNewCriticalVulnerabilitiesInput
description: Input structure for the no_new_critical_vulnerabilities predicate.

scan_target.description: File path or directory to scan, relative to workspace root.

scanner_id.description: Identifier of the deterministic vulnerability scanner to use.

before_snapshot_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the workspace snapshot before the task.

after_snapshot_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the workspace snapshot after the task.
